title: Vendor Backroute / Checkpoint Backlot
notes: Connector between C4, D3, E4, and D5.
Vendor backroute / checkpoint backlot with loading docks, logistics gate, checkpoint spillover, overflow cage, service cellar, and hidden route marks.
Designed for Astro Van, patrol cars, service vehicles, and smuggler traffic.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
